title: Pega Business & Test Analyst | Contract
description:
Job Scope:

  • Perform business analysis responsibilities including requirements gathering, analysis, clarification, and documentation in collaboration with business and product stakeholders.
  • Act as a Pega Business Analyst, contributing to Pega business flows, case life cycles, rules validation, and functional design discussions.
  • Translate business requirements into functional specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria, ensuring clarity and testability
  • Develop test scripts and test cases, and execute functional, integration, regression, and UAT testing.
  • Apply business and functional knowledge to support end-to-end testing strategies defined by the Test Lead.
  • Prepare and maintain test artifacts such as test cases, traceability matrices, and execution reports.
  • Collaborate closely with the Test Lead, development, business, and product teams to ensure quality deliverables.
  • Identify, document, and track defects using tools such as JIRA or Azure DevOps.
  • Participate in requirement reviews, sprint planning, and release readiness activities.
  • Support automation and CI/CD integration where applicable (automation scripting is optional).

Job Qualifications:

  • Degree in Information Technology or equivalent.
  • 4–7 years of overall experience with a solid mix of business analysis and software testing background.
  • Preferably with Certified Pega Business Analyst and/or Pega project experience.
  • Hands-on experience in functional, regression, integration, and UAT testing.
  • Good understanding of software development lifecycle, software testing lifecycle, Agile methodologies, and the defect lifecycle.
  • Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments, with excellent communication and analytical skills.


Interested candidates can click apply for more information.

** We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. **

We respect your privacy and all communication will be treated with confidentiality.  If you wish to know more about this position or explore other roles, please prepare your updated profile and get in touch with our consultants.

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Rallonza Bernice Mae Nocum | EA License No. 02C3423 Personnel | Registration No. R1442141

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
